mapper.select: SELECT bill_date AS date, COUNT(*) AS billCount, SUM(total_qty) AS totalQty, SUM(total_amount_tax) AS totalAmount, SUM(profit_amount) AS totalProfit FROM sal_delivery WHERE bill_status IN ('CHECKED','FINISHED') AND deleted = 0 AND bill_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY bill_date ORDER BY bill_date

SELECT customer_id AS customerId, customer_name AS customerName, COUNT(*) AS billCount, SUM(total_amount_tax) AS totalAmount FROM sal_delivery WHERE bill_status IN ('CHECKED','FINISHED') AND deleted = 0 AND bill_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY customer_id, customer_name ORDER BY totalAmount DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT product_id AS productId, product_code AS productCode, product_name AS productName, spec, unit_name AS unitName, SUM(qty) AS qty, SUM(available_qty) AS availableQty, AVG(avg_cost) AS avgCost, SUM(total_cost) AS totalCost FROM inv_stock WHERE deleted = 0 GROUP BY product_id, product_code, product_name, spec, unit_name ORDER BY totalCost DESC

SELECT product_id AS productId, product_name AS productName, batch_no AS batchNo, qty, last_in_date AS lastInDate, DATEDIFF(NOW(), last_in_date) AS days FROM inv_stock WHERE deleted = 0 AND qty > 0 ORDER BY last_in_date

SELECT customer_id AS partnerId, customer_name AS partnerName, SUM(amount) AS totalAmount, SUM(paid_amount) AS paidAmount, SUM(balance) AS balance FROM fin_arap WHERE deleted = 0 AND bill_type = #{billType} GROUP BY customer_id, customer_name

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(bill_date, '%Y-%m') AS month, SUM(total_amount_tax) AS totalAmount, SUM(cost_amount) AS totalCost, SUM(profit_amount) AS totalProfit, CASE WHEN SUM(total_amount_tax) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE SUM(profit_amount)/SUM(total_amount_tax)*100 END AS profitRate FROM sal_delivery WHERE bill_status IN ('CHECKED','FINISHED') AND deleted = 0 AND bill_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(bill_date, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY month

SELECT (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(total_amount_tax),0) FROM sal_delivery WHERE DATE(bill_date)=CURDATE() AND bill_status IN ('CHECKED','FINISHED') AND deleted=0) AS todaySales, (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(total_amount_tax),0) FROM sal_delivery WHERE bill_status IN ('CHECKED','FINISHED') AND deleted=0) AS totalSales, (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(total_amount_tax),0) FROM pur_receipt WHERE DATE(bill_date)=CURDATE() AND bill_status IN ('CHECKED','FINISHED') AND deleted=0) AS todayPurchase, (SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(*),0) FROM inv_stock WHERE deleted = 0) AS stockSkuCount, (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(balance),0) FROM fin_arap WHERE deleted = 0 AND bill_type = 'AR') AS arBalance, (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(balance),0) FROM fin_arap WHERE deleted = 0 AND bill_type = 'AP') AS apBalance, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM inv_warning WHERE status = 0) AS warningCount
